infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeGuard needs location to send your GPS coordinates in emergency alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeGuard uses background location to continuously update your position during an active emergency.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SafeGuard listens for distress keywords and records audio evidence during emergencies.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SafeGuard records silent video evidence during active emergencies.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: SafeGuard uses motion sensors to detect falls and struggle patterns.
